extDescription.message: Der datenschutzorientierte ChatGPT-Theme-Manager. Passe Designs an und verfolge Tokens lokal — jetzt mit einem Seitenzähler.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store and browser extension manager

popup_sign_in.description: Header button shown when user is not authenticated

popup_status_lifetime.description: Header button label for lifetime subscribers

popup_status_trial.description: Header button label for users in their free trial

popup_status_premium.description: Header button label for paid subscribers

popup_status_active.description: Tooltip for the green status dot indicating an active subscription

popup_status_connected.description: Tooltip for the status dot indicating a connected but not active account

popup_account_heading.description: Section heading in the account panel when connected

popup_disconnect.description: Button to disconnect the user's account

popup_plan_lifetime.description: Badge label for lifetime access plan

popup_plan_trial.description: Badge label shown during the free trial period

popup_plan_yearly.description: Badge label for annual subscription plan

popup_plan_monthly.description: Badge label for monthly subscription plan

popup_credits_remaining.description: Shows how many theme downloads remain in the current billing period

popup_trial_days_left.description: Shows how many days remain in the free trial

popup_start_trial.description: CTA button for users without a subscription to start a free trial

popup_sub_ended.description: Message shown when a user's subscription is canceled

popup_reactivate.message: Reaktivieren Sie es, um den Zugang wiederherzustellen.
popup_reactivate.description: Link text to reactivate a canceled subscription

popup_payment_failed.description: Message shown when the most recent payment has failed

popup_update_billing.message: Aktualisieren Sie Ihre Zahlungsdaten, um den Zugang wiederherzustellen.
popup_update_billing.description: Link text to update payment method for past-due accounts

popup_connect_heading.description: Section heading in the account panel when not connected

popup_connect_subtext.message: Melden Sie sich an, um 8 animierte Premium-Themes freizuschalten.
popup_connect_subtext.description: Subtitle in the connect account panel

popup_connecting.description: Loading state text shown while connecting

popup_or_paste_token.description: Divider text between OAuth and token input methods

popup_token_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the authentication token input field

popup_go.description: Submit button label for the token input form

popup_review_ask.message: Gefällt Ihnen ThemeGPT? Eine kurze Bewertung hilft anderen, es zu finden. ⭐
popup_review_ask.description: Banner asking users to leave a review on the Chrome Web Store

popup_leave_review.description: Button to open the Chrome Web Store review page

popup_maybe_later.description: Button to dismiss the review request banner

popup_manage_account.description: Footer link to the account management page

popup_session_expired.description: Status message shown when the auth token has expired

popup_connection_error.description: Status message shown when a network or server error occurs

popup_invalid_token.description: Status message shown when the provided auth token is invalid

popup_account_connected.description: Status message shown after successfully connecting an active account

popup_account_connected_inactive.description: Status message shown after connecting an account without an active subscription

popup_connection_failed.description: Status message shown when authentication fails

popup_no_downloads.message: Keine Downloads in diesem Zeitraum verbleibend. Verwalten Sie Ihr Konto auf themegpt.ai
popup_no_downloads.description: Error shown when the user has exhausted their theme downloads for the billing period

popup_connect_first.message: Bitte verbinden Sie zuerst Ihr Konto.
popup_connect_first.description: Error shown when an action requires authentication

popup_trial_teaser_1.message: Dies ist ein Premium-Theme — starten Sie Ihre kostenlose 30-Tage-Testversion.
popup_trial_teaser_1.description: First upsell message shown when clicking a locked premium theme

popup_trial_teaser_2.message: Schalten Sie alle 8 Premium-Themes mit einer kostenlosen 30-Tage-Testversion frei.
popup_trial_teaser_2.description: Second upsell message shown on repeated clicks of locked premium themes

popup_trial_teaser_3.message: Sie kehren immer wieder zu Premium-Themes zurück. Schalten Sie alle 30 Tage kostenlos frei.
popup_trial_teaser_3.description: Third upsell message shown on repeated clicks of locked premium themes

popup_connection_error_retry.description: Error shown when a network error occurs during theme download

popup_failed_to_unlock.description: Error shown when the theme download API returns an error

popup_theme_apply_label.description: Accessible label for the theme card button when the theme is unlocked

popup_theme_unlock_label.description: Accessible label for the theme card button when the theme is locked

token_counter_session_tokens.description: Section heading for the token counter in the popup and canvas overlay

token_counter_input.description: Label for user input token count

token_counter_output.description: Label for AI output token count

token_counter_canvas.description: Label for the canvas overlay position selector

token_counter_off.description: Option to disable the canvas token counter

token_counter_side_top.description: Option to show the canvas counter in the sidebar at the top

token_counter_compose_right.description: Option to show the canvas counter to the right of the composer

token_counter_estimated.message: Geschätzt · Keine Daten verlassen Ihren Browser
token_counter_estimated.description: Privacy disclaimer shown below the token counter
